case_title: SPAHN, DAVID BRYANT VS CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY SPAHN, DAVID BRYANT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
